# CGFontPostScriptFormat.type1

**Case**

A Type 1 font format.

## Declaration

```swift
case type1
```

## Discussion

This is documented in *Adobe Type 1 Font Format*, which is available from [http://partners.adobe.com/].

## Constants

- **CGFontPostScriptFormat.type3**: A Type 3 PostScript format.
- **CGFontPostScriptFormat.type42**: A constant representing a Type 42 font format.

items.description: A constant representing a Type 42 font format.
items.name: CGFontPostScriptFormat.type42
